title: Conversation Scripts
description: Discovery and business owner conversation scripts that help Partners understand context, timing, use of funds, and possible next steps without making unsafe claims.
safeLanguageReminders: Explain that options depend on business profile and provider criteria.
State that approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed.
restrictedLanguageWarnings: Do not quote rates, terms, amounts, or timelines before provider review.
Do not imply every business owner qualifies.

title: Email Scripts
description: Short email scripts for introductions, recap messages, referral source check-ins, and next-step follow-up.
exampleScripts: Warm intro email to a business owner
safeLanguageReminders: Use may be available when discussing possible options.
Include provider criteria apply when funding options are mentioned.
restrictedLanguageWarnings: Do not create urgency that implies guaranteed timing.
Do not use income, revenue, or funding outcome claims.

title: Referral Partner Scripts
description: Scripts for professional referral source conversations with bank managers, accountants, attorneys, equipment dealers, trucking businesses, construction contacts, and local connectors.
safeLanguageReminders: Position the Partner as a responsible next step.
Use when traditional financing is delayed, unavailable, or not the right fit today.
Explain that one application can help identify possible funding paths.
restrictedLanguageWarnings: Do not say we approve what banks deny.
Do not imply a referral source can promise approval or terms.

title: Objection Handling Scripts
description: Safe responses to questions about approval, rates, terms, timing, documentation, qualification, and provider review.
exampleScripts: What to say when a client asks about rates
What to say when a client asks if they are approved
What to say when a client asks how fast funding can happen
safeLanguageReminders: Possible terms depend on business profile and provider criteria.
Review timelines and documentation needs vary.
Approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed.
restrictedLanguageWarnings: Do not say approval is likely unless a provider has confirmed.
Do not say no documents are needed.

title: Follow-Up Scripts
description: Follow-up scripts for business owners, referral partners, and open opportunities after an initial conversation.
exampleScripts: Follow-up after initial business owner call
safeLanguageReminders: Follow up on next actions and needed information.
Use review and possible options language.
Keep the message clear without implying an outcome.
restrictedLanguageWarnings: Do not imply that submitting information guarantees approval.
Do not imply a timeline is guaranteed.
Do not pressure the business owner with unsupported claims.

title: Compliance Rewrite Scripts
description: Rewrite patterns for turning unsafe funding claims into clearer, safer Partner-facing language.
safeLanguageReminders: Use the default disclaimer when funding options are discussed.
restrictedLanguageWarnings: Do not preserve unsafe claims for tone.
Do not make the claim more persuasive if it is inaccurate.
